title: Skill & Agent Pipeline
description: Developer command routing through skills and agents — from slash commands through expert skills, design intelligence, conductor pipeline, and testing to outputs.

nodes.label: /feature-pipeline
nodes.tooltip: End-to-end feature development: design spec → ticket generation → conductor build. Orchestrates the full lifecycle.

nodes.label: /design-spec
nodes.tooltip: Generate a comprehensive design specification for a feature, including UX flows, data model, and API contracts.

nodes.label: /ticket-gen
nodes.tooltip: Generate GitHub issues from a design spec, organized by phase with acceptance criteria.

nodes.label: /conductor start #N
nodes.tooltip: Start the autonomous conductor pipeline for a specific GitHub issue.

nodes.label: /preflight
nodes.tooltip: Pre-merge quality gate: lint, typecheck, format, build, and test validation.

nodes.label: /audit
nodes.tooltip: Code quality audit across the codebase for patterns, consistency, and best practices.

nodes.label: /marketplace-audit
nodes.tooltip: Competitive analysis against real marketplace platforms (Etsy, Reverb, Poshmark) for feature parity.

nodes.label: /a11y-audit
nodes.tooltip: Accessibility audit using WCAG guidelines, checking semantic HTML, ARIA, keyboard nav, and color contrast.

nodes.label: /ui-test
nodes.tooltip: Visual UI testing via browser automation — verifies component rendering and interaction behavior.

nodes.label: /feature-scaffold
nodes.tooltip: Scaffold a new feature directory with standard structure: components, hooks, services, types, constants.

nodes.label: /db-migrate
nodes.tooltip: Generate and apply Supabase database migrations with RLS policies and indexes.

nodes.label: /write-tests
nodes.tooltip: Generate Vitest unit and integration tests for existing code.

nodes.label: /debug
nodes.tooltip: Systematic debugging skill for investigating and resolving issues.

nodes.label: /ask-supabase
nodes.tooltip: Auto-triggers when editing Supabase files. Provides context on RLS, auth patterns, storage, and database operations.

nodes.label: /ask-nextjs
nodes.tooltip: Auto-triggers when editing App Router files. Provides context on routing, server components, and proxy.ts patterns.

nodes.label: /ask-vercel
nodes.tooltip: Auto-triggers when editing Vercel config. Provides context on deployment, crons, and platform configuration.

nodes.label: /ask-scss
nodes.tooltip: Auto-triggers when editing SCSS modules. Provides context on design tokens, theming, and styling patterns.

nodes.label: /ask-state
nodes.tooltip: Auto-triggers when editing hooks or stores. Provides context on Tanstack Query, Zustand, and state management patterns.

nodes.label: ux-researcher
nodes.tooltip: Researches UX patterns from competitor marketplaces and generates design recommendations for Nessi features.

nodes.label: marketplace-audit
nodes.tooltip: Analyzes real marketplace platforms for feature parity, UX patterns, and competitive insights.

nodes.label: plan-architect
nodes.tooltip: Generates phased implementation plans from GitHub issues.

nodes.label: task-executor
nodes.tooltip: Implements individual tasks with pre-loaded expert skills.

nodes.label: phase-verifier
nodes.tooltip: Validates phase completion before advancing.

nodes.label: review-orchestrator
nodes.tooltip: Runs quality gates: preflight, ui-test, a11y-audit.

nodes.label: finding-resolver
nodes.tooltip: Creates atomic fix tasks from review findings.

nodes.label: debug-investigator
nodes.tooltip: Deep investigation for tasks failing 3+ times.

nodes.label: pr-creator
nodes.tooltip: Creates pull request with structured description.

nodes.label: ticket-generator
nodes.tooltip: Generates GitHub issues from design specs.

nodes.label: ui-tester
nodes.tooltip: Browser-based UI testing agent for visual verification and interaction testing.

nodes.label: browser-debug
nodes.tooltip: Browser automation agent for debugging rendering and interaction issues.

nodes.label: a11y-auditor
nodes.tooltip: Accessibility auditing agent checking WCAG compliance.

nodes.label: test-author
nodes.tooltip: Generates unit and integration tests for existing code.

nodes.label: Design Specs
nodes.tooltip: Markdown design specifications produced by /design-spec and ux-researcher.

nodes.label: GitHub Issues
nodes.tooltip: Structured GitHub issues with acceptance criteria, organized on the project kanban board.

nodes.label: Pull Request
nodes.tooltip: Final output of the conductor pipeline — a ready-to-review PR linked to the source issue.
